evals.prompt: Generate a hero image for my SaaS landing page. It should be a minimal abstract background with soft gradients — something premium looking, not stock-photo-y. I need space on the right side for headline text. Use cool tones, maybe blues and grays.
evals.expected_output: A single wide-aspect-ratio PNG image (16:9) with abstract gradient background, cool blue/gray tones, negative space on the right for text overlay. No text, no logos, no watermarks in the image.
expectations: The agent uses the bundled CLI (scripts/image_gen.py) with the generate command
The prompt is augmented into a structured spec (has Use case, Primary request, etc.)
The aspect ratio is set to 16:9 (wide landscape, not 1:1)
The augmented prompt includes constraints about no text, no logos, no watermark
The augmented prompt mentions negative space on the right side for headline text
A negative prompt or Avoid line is included to prevent stock-photo or tacky effects
The output file is saved with a descriptive name, not just output.png
The final prompt and CLI flags used are reported to the user

evals.prompt: I need a set of 4 game UI icons for my RPG: a sword, a shield, a health potion, and a mana crystal. They should all be in the same painted/hand-drawn style, round icon format with transparent backgrounds. Save them in output/game-icons/
evals.expected_output: 4 separate PNG images in output/game-icons/ directory, each depicting one icon (sword, shield, health potion, mana crystal) in consistent painted style, square 1:1 format.
expectations: The agent uses generate-batch (JSONL batch) since there are 4 distinct prompts
A JSONL file is created with 4 jobs, one per icon
Each job prompt specifies painted/hand-drawn game UI icon style for consistency
The aspect ratio is 1:1 for icons
Output directory is set to output/game-icons/ via --out-dir
The JSONL temporary file is cleaned up after the batch completes
Each prompt includes constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark
All 4 prompts share consistent style keywords for visual cohesion

evals.prompt: I have a product photo of a ceramic mug (it's at product-photos/mug.png). Can you remove the background and put it on a clean white studio backdrop instead? Keep the mug exactly as-is, just change what's behind it.
evals.expected_output: An edited version of the input image where only the background is replaced with a clean white studio gradient, while the ceramic mug remains unchanged in appearance, position, and lighting.
expectations: The agent uses the edit command (not generate) since an input image is provided
The --image flag points to the input image path
The edit prompt explicitly states invariants: keep the mug unchanged, change only the background
The model used is imagen-3.0-capability-001 (the edit model, not the generate model)
The augmented prompt classifies this as precise-object-edit use case
A negative prompt or constraints line prevents unwanted changes to the product
The output is saved to a descriptive path (not just output.png)
